name: Stitch Money
description: South African open banking API for direct bank-to-bank payments and account data access across Africa.

seo.title: Stitch Money — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Stitch Money: South African open banking API for direct bank-to-bank payments and account data access across Africa.

when_to_use: South African bank-to-bank payments via open banking API
Account data access for South African fintech applications
Direct EFT and instant payment initiation across African banks
Enabling recurring bank payments for subscription businesses
KYC-backed account verification for African fintechs

pros: Deep coverage of South African and African banks
Pay-by-bank rails cheaper than card processing
Clean API and good developer onboarding
cons: Coverage outside South Africa still expanding
Success rates depend on bank app adoption
Fewer enterprise features than global peers
review.verdict: Best-in-class for African pay-by-bank and bank data, but scope is tightly regional by design.
review.best_for: African or Africa-focused fintechs needing local bank payments and data
review.not_for: Global products where African markets are a tiny share of volume
